business.name: Handyman Pro's
business.tagline: Orlando and crew — fixing what needs fixing

hero.headline: The handyman Columbia calls *when it matters*
hero.subheadline: Orlando and his sons show up when promised, work clean, and charge fair. Ask your neighbors — they already know.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Doors, fans, TVs, trim — pretty much anything
services_section.subheading: From quick repairs to bigger installations, we handle the jobs that make your house work better

services.title: Door Installation & Repair
services.description: Screen doors, entry doors, framing work — hung straight and secure. We measure twice, install once.

services.title: Ceiling Fan Installation
services.description: Mount them right the first time. Balanced, wired properly, and ready to keep you cool all summer.

services.title: TV Mounting
services.description: Get that TV off the dresser and on the wall where it belongs. Clean wiring, sturdy mounts, perfect height.

services.title: Trim & Exterior Repairs
services.description: Loose trim, damaged siding, roof peak work — we fix what weather and time have worn down.

services.title: General Repairs
services.description: The odds and ends that pile up around the house. One call handles them all.

about.heading: Orlando and his sons — Columbia handymen since day one
about.body: We're the family team your neighbors already trust. Orlando leads every job with his sons, bringing decades of experience to each project. We show up on time, work clean, communicate clearly, and charge fairly. Simple as that. Columbia is home — we take care of our community's homes the same way we'd take care of our own.

reviews.name: Cynthia R.
reviews.text: Orlando and Ezra replaced my screen door perfectly. Great communication — called to schedule, texted when coming. Professional work, exactly as promised.

reviews.name: John R.
reviews.text: They've been out twice — installed ceiling fans and mounted our TV. Professional, friendly, fair prices. Will definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Brynn J.
reviews.text: Flawless door framing and installation. Extremely fair pricing, top-notch work. Orlando and his son handle anything you need. Fast, reliable, highly recommended.

reviews.name: Jim S.
reviews.text: Called for roof trim repair — they came over in 15 minutes! Respectful, pleasant, great work at reasonable price. Would hire again without hesitation.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Columbia and surrounding communities
service_areas.subheading: Quick response times throughout the Midlands region

cta.heading: Ready to get that project done right?
cta.body: Call Orlando and the crew. Fair pricing, quality work, and the kind of service that keeps Columbia neighbors coming back.
